ammo_v2.name: .22 LR 40gr CCI Mini-Mag CPRN
ammo_v2._source: CCI #0030 Mini-Mag 40gr Copper Plated Round Nose. G1 BC ~0.130 per precision testing (Target Sports USA ballistics data). MV 1235 fps (376.4 m/s) from 18.5-in Ruger 10/22 barrel per CCI published spec. Subsonic from pistols (~950-1085 fps). Bullet diameter 0.222 in; length ~15.60 mm. mv_adj 10 fps/in for barrels 16-22 in.

ammo_v2.name: 5.56 NATO 62gr M855 FMJ
ammo_v2._source: US M855 / NATO SS109. BC 0.307 G1 per Litz Applied Ballistics. MV 2920 fps (889.0 m/s) from 16-in barrel.

ammo_v2.name: 6.5 Grendel 123gr Lapua Scenar HPBT
ammo_v2._source: Lapua GB528 Scenar 123gr. G7 BC 0.263 per Lapua. MV 762 m/s (2500 fps) from 18-in barrel per community chrono data. G7 model (drag_model_index 6). Length 34.60 mm per Lapua datasheet.

ammo_v2.name: 6mm Creedmoor 109gr Berger LRHT
ammo_v2._source: Berger 109gr Long Range Hybrid Target. G7 BC 0.278 per Berger. MV 2966 fps (904 m/s) from 26-in barrel per 2024 PRS survey data. 7% of top PRS shooters use this cartridge. mv_adj 25 fps/in.

ammo_v2.name: Hornady 6.5 Creedmoor 140gr ELD-M
ammo_v2._source: Hornady #81500. G7 BC 0.326 per Hornady at Mach 2.25. 2710 fps from 24-in barrel. G7 model (drag_model_index 6).

ammo_v2.name: .308 Win 168gr BTHP MatchKing Federal
ammo_v2._source: Federal GM308M / Sierra #2200. BC 0.462 G1 (Sierra dominant velocity zone). MV 2650 fps (807.7 m/s) from 24-in barrel.

ammo_v2.name: .308 Win 175gr Federal Gold Medal SMK BTHP
.30-06 Springfield 168gr BTHP MatchKing
ammo_v2._source: Federal Gold Medal GM3006M / Sierra #2200 168gr MatchKing. Same projectile as .308 Win 168gr SMK; larger .30-06 case delivers ~50 fps additional MV from equivalent barrel. G1 BC 0.462 (Sierra dominant velocity zone). MV 2700 fps (823.0 m/s) from 24-in barrel per Federal published data. mv_adj 20 fps/in (larger case, slightly different curve than .308 Win).

ammo_v2.name: .30-06 Springfield 150gr FMJ
ammo_v2._source: M2 Ball equivalent / Federal AE, Remington UMC, Winchester USA. Generic 150gr .30 cal FMJ (flat base, mild steel core). G1 BC 0.338 per Sierra #2105 / Federal published trajectory data. MV 2910 fps (887.0 m/s) from 24-in barrel. mv_adj 20 fps/in. Bullet length ~28.00 mm typical for 150gr .308 FMJ.

ammo_v2.name: .338 Lapua Magnum 250gr Lapua Scenar HPBT
ammo_v2._source: Lapua GB528. G1 BC 0.675. 2970 fps (905.3 m/s) from 26-in barrel. mv_adj 31.6 fps/in.

ammo_v2.name: .50 BMG 750gr Hornady A-Max Match
ammo_v2._source: Hornady #8270. G1 BC 1.050. Ref 29-in Barrett barrel; Hornady test barrel is 36-in at 2820 fps; 812.2 m/s (2665 fps) estimated for 29-in. mv_adj 22.0 fps/in.
